hero.headline: Creating impact through presence, performance, and purpose.
hero.roles: Colombian Actress | Professional Dancer | Entrepreneur | TikTok Streamer

about.title: Meet Cristyna
about.p1: I'm Cristyna—a Colombian actress, professional dance performer, and entrepreneur based in the heart of Latin America. My journey began on stage, where I discovered that movement and emotion are languages everyone understands.
about.p2: Whether I'm in front of the camera, leading a dance production, or building businesses that matter, I bring the same commitment: authenticity, discipline, and a relentless pursuit of excellence.
about.p3: I believe in the power of storytelling to create connection and inspire change. Every project I take on is an opportunity to share that belief with the world.

strengths.title: What I Bring
strengths.subtitle: The qualities that define my work and drive every performance.

presence.title: Presence
presence.description: Every moment on stage or screen is an opportunity to captivate. I command attention through authenticity and intention.

creativity.title: Creativity
creativity.description: Art lives in the unexpected. I bring fresh perspectives and bold choices to every role and project I take on.

discipline.title: Discipline
discipline.description: Years of dance training taught me that mastery comes from dedication. I show up prepared, focused, and ready to deliver.

adaptability.title: Adaptability
adaptability.description: From dramatic roles to dynamic choreography to business ventures—I thrive in new environments and embrace every challenge.

featured.title: Featured
featured.subtitle: Discover more about my work, ventures, and creative projects.

t1.name: María Valentina
t1.quote: Titans Agency transformed my TikTok presence. In just 3 months, I went from 10K to 100K followers and landed my first major brand deal.

t2.name: Carlos Rodríguez
t2.quote: The coaching and strategy from Titans helped me understand what content actually works. My engagement tripled in the first month!

t3.name: Luciana Pérez
t3.quote: Finally an agency that understands Latin creators! They helped me monetize my content and negotiate deals I never thought possible.

join.title: Apply to Join TITANS AGENCY LATAM
join.scanText: Scan the QR code to get more information about the agency and submit an application to join.

instructions.download: Download and save the image to your device
instructions.open: Open TikTok > Profile > Add Friends > Scan

join.disclaimer: Scanning the QR code only provides information about the agency.
join.contactSubtitle: Prefer to reach out directly? Send us a message on WhatsApp for a faster response.
join.whatsappNote: We typically respond within 24 hours. Available Monday to Saturday.
